person.name: Ebles IV de VENTADOUR
person.alternateName: Ebles V Dit Archambaud Ier De Ventadour
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Armoirie de la famille de Ventadour :
Échiqueté d'or et de gueules.
Ebles IV dit AArchambaud de Turenne , fils d'Ebles III Vicomte de Ventadour et sa seconde épouse Adelais de Montpellier (-après le 2 juin 1214). Le Chronicon Gaufredi Vosiensis nomme « primus Guillelmus Abbas Tutelensis », décédé à l'adolescence, « alter Ebolus Cluniacensis Monachus, Decanus de Mauriac, item Bernardus Monachus et Abbas Tutelensis, Guido Canonicus de Magalona, ​​Raymundus et Helias Canonici S. Stephani Lemovicensis, ex baptismo Archambaldus, itemque alius Ebolus qui fratrem aliquotes præliis vexavit "comme enfants de" Ebolus "et de sa femme" filia Guillelmi de Montepislerio… Alaiz " [1] .  
Vicomte de Ventadour . " Ebolus vicecomes Ventedornensis " a accordé des exonérations fiscales à Notre-Dame de Dalon, accordé à "Willelmi consanguinei mei Dalonensis abbatis "avec le consentement de" vicecomitissa ", par charte datée de 1174, en présence de " Raimundus frater meus Lemovicensis canonicus… Aimo patruus meus… Alaiz mater mea … " [2] .
" Ebolus vicecomes de Ventedorn "fit don de Tulle Saint -Martin, en présence de " domini Bernardi fratris mei tunc abbatis Tutellensis ", par charte du 2 juin 1214 [3] . 

Mariage ([1170/74]) SIBYLLE de Faye , fille de RAOUL de Châtellerault Seigneur de Faye et de son épouse --- (-10 mai 1219). Le Chronicon Gaufredi Vosiensis nomme " Sibylla filia Radulfi de Faya, qui fuit frater Guillelmi Vicecomitis de Castelleyrac " comme épouse de " Ebolus qui ex baptismo Archambaldus " [4] . 
Son mariage est daté de la charte de 1174 en vertu de laquelle " Ebolus vicecomes Ventedornensis " accorda des exonérations fiscales à Notre-Dame de Dalon avec le consentement de " vicecomitissa " (sans nom) [5] . 
Son nom est confirmé par la Chronique de Geoffroy de Vigeois qui nomme "Ebolo filio Eboli et Sybillæ " [6] . 

Ebles [IV] et sa femme ont eu des enfants:

sources  :
[1] Ex Chronico Gaufredi Vosiensis, 24, RHGF XII, p. 424. 
[2] Dalon Notre-Dame 742, p. 181. 
[3] Baluze (1717), Annexe Actorum Veterum, col. 513. 
[4] Ex Chronico Gaufredi Vosiensis, 24, RHGF XII, p. 424. 
[5] Dalon Notre-Dame 742, p. 181. 
[6] Stroński (1914), p. 41, qui ne cite pas la référence source. 
relevé  JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas

zh.Cassino,,Provincia di Frosinone,Latium,I: 義大利拉其福洛希農卡希諾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ebles IV de VENTADOUR於大約1151年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾時，他的父親Ebles III de VENTADOUR45歲，母親Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER21歲。他於1174年與Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT在法國利姆辛結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1214年6月2日在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在法國利姆辛豪-維安沙吉希爾維斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ebles IV de VENTADOUR于大约1151年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷姆斯-文塔度爾时，他的父亲Ebles III de VENTADOUR45岁，母亲Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER21岁。他于1174年与Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT在法国利姆辛结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1214年6月2日在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在法国利姆辛豪-維安沙吉希爾維斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ebles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Able , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Americanized form of German and Dutch   Abels  .

variants.name: Able
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the younger son of Adam and Eve, who was murdered for reasons of jealousy by his brother Cain (Genesis 4:1–8). The Hebrew form is Hevel, ostensibly representing the vocabulary word hevel ‘breath, vapour’, and so taken to imply vanity or worthlessness. Abel is considered by the Christian Church to have been a pre-Christian martyr (see Matthew 23:35), and is invoked as a saint in the litany for the dying. Nevertheless, his name has not been much used either before or after its brief vogue among the Puritans.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Ebles IV de VENTADOUR was born about 1151, in Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Ebles III de VENTADOUR, was 45 and his mother, Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER, was 21. He married Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT in 1174, in Limousin, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 2 June 1214, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Saint-Sylvestre, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ebles IV de VENTADOUR est né environ 1151, à Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Ebles III de VENTADOUR, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT en 1174, à Limousin, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 2 juin 1214, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Sylvestre, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ebles IV de VENTADOUR um 1151 in Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ebles III de VENTADOUR 45 und seine Mutter Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER 21. Er hat 1174 in Limousin, Frankreich Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 2. Juni 1214 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saint-Sylvestre, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ebles IV de VENTADOUR è nato il circa 1151 nel Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Ebles III de VENTADOUR, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT nel 1174, nel Limousin, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 2 giugno 1214, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Sylvestre, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia.

ja.Saint-Sylvestre, Haute-Vienne, Limousin,: フランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンサイント-シルベストア
ja.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de VENTADOURが約1151年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズモウスティエル-ベンタドウルで生まれた時，父Ebles III de VENTADOURは45歳，母Adélaïde de MONTPELLIERは21歳であった。1174年にフランスリモウシンでSibylle de CHATELLERAULTと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1214年6月2日に故郷で64歳で死去し，フランスリモウシンハウテ-ヴィエンサイント-シルベストアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ebles IV de VENTADOUR(이)가 대략 1151년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 모우스티-븐타다어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ebles III de VENTADOUR(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1174년 프랑스 리모우신에서 Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1214년 6월 2일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 리모우신 하테-비니 세인트-실베스트르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ebles IV de VENTADOUR nasceu aproximadamente 1151, em Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Ebles III de VENTADOUR, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT em 1174, em Limousin, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de junho de 1214, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Sylvestre, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ebles IV de VENTADOUR родился около 1151 г. в местности мустиир-вентадоур, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Ebles III de VENTADOUR было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT в 1174 г. в местности лимусин, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 2 июня 1214 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-силвестр, хауте-виенн, лимусин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ebles IV de VENTADOUR nació aproximadamente 1151, en Moustier-Ventadour, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Ebles III de VENTADOUR, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Adélaïde de MONTPELLIER, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sibylle de CHATELLERAULT en 1174, en Limousin, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 2 de junio de 1214, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Sylvestre, Haute-Vienne, Limousin, Francia.
